title: [kimi-review] bf54a79: [SEVERITY: high] The diff is empty — the commit contains no
description:
Commit: bf54a79aa
Message: fix(schc): bounds check tail in header build functions

Finding: [SEVERITY: high] The diff is empty — the commit contains no actual code changes. The bounds-check fix described in the commit message does not appear to be included (likely an incomplete `git add`/staging problem). If this commit was intended to fix an out-of-bounds read/write in SCHC header build functions, the vulnerability presumably remains unfixed.
